title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at JioMart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at JioMart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the JioMart family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About JioMart:
JioMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart!
